title: oberonia denticulata var. iridifolia
intro: Oberonia denticulata var. iridifolia, also known as Iridescent Oberonia, is a species of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oberonia denticulata var. iridifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
